title: Vyapar vs MobiBix: Which is Better for Mobile Repair Shops?
excerpt: A detailed comparison between general accounting software and specialized mobile retail OS for Indian shop owners.
content:
When Indian mobile shop owners search for billing software, they usually find Vyapar or Marg ERP. While great for grocery stores, general billing software forces you to hack together IMEI tracking and lacks any concept of repair jobs.

Here is why 500+ Indian shops switched to MobiBix:

### 1. Hardcore IMEI Tracking
Vyapar treats a smartphone like a packet of chips. MobiBix tracks the lifecycle of every unique device from purchase to sale, and even through repair channels.

### 2. Built-in Repair CRM
You can't create 'Job Cards' for a broken iPhone screen in a generic billing app. In MobiBix, you create a ticket, assign a technician, and the app automatically WhatsApps the customer when it is ready for pickup.

### 3. Setup Time
Setting up new software is scary. MobiBix is strictly tuned for electronics. There are no unused 'manufacturing' tabs clogging up your screen.
